summary: Wrote 127 unit tests for suite-integrations/api/webhooks_router.py covering all status mapping functions, signature verification, secret getters, drift detection, _init_db schema verification, Pydantic models, exponential backoff, and connector settings. All 127 tests pass in 7.05s under pytest --timeout=10.
issues: The project-wide 40% coverage gate fails (0.36% measured in this run because only the webhook module was under test). This is a pre-existing known issue documented in CLAUDE.md.

The module fires _init_db() at import time (line 139). We handle this by pointing webhooks_router._db_path to a tmp_path in an autouse fixture immediately after import, then calling _init_db() again to initialise the temp DB.
